approach: Gate the WorkflowEditorProvider's redirect on a diff/non-file context check; render raw text fallback when skipped so the panel is never empty.

T001.did: Added isDiffContext check (URI scheme !== 'file' || active tab is TabInputTextDiff) to short-circuit redirect; added escapeHtml + renderPlainText helpers to fill webview with raw markdown when skipping.
concerns: Manual UI verification (clicking spec from explorer, opening SCM diff for modified spec.md) was not performed by the agent — only npm run compile was verified. User must smoke test in Extension Development Host before shipping.

concerns.note: Manual Extension Development Host smoke tests (explorer click → SpecViewer opens; SCM diff → text diff editor without SpecViewer popup) require user verification — agent only verified TypeScript compile.

decisions: Used vscode.TabInputTextDiff instanceof check on activeTabGroup.activeTab.input to detect diff context (works alongside the URI scheme check, which catches the `git:` HEAD side).
Added inline escapeHtml + renderPlainText helpers in the same file rather than reaching for a shared util — none exists for this and the function is two lines.

specify.key_finding: WorkflowEditorProvider's custom editor (registered for **/specs/**/*.md with priority default) unconditionally redirects to SpecViewer in resolveCustomTextEditor without checking the document URI scheme or active diff tab
